data.title: Seal Security partners with Wiz, joining WIN to deliver secure container base images for vulnerability remediation.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel on January 13, 2026, Seal Security has revealed its collaboration with top cloud security provider Wiz and is now a member of the Wiz Integration Network (WIN). This partnership bolsters WIN with Seal Security's robust base images, emphasizing the importance of cybersecurity.

data.title: Brent Reynolds named President for Master-Planned Communities in the South Region by FirstService Residential. In Florida, Georgia, Tennessee.
data.description: A recent announcement states that a new position has been created to enhance growth and operational efficiency for the company's growing large-scale, master-planned lifestyle collection in Florida, Georgia, and Tennessee. The company in question, based in Plantation, Florida, disclosed this move on January 13, 2026. FirstService Residential, recognized as a top property management firm in North America, is taking strategic steps to bolster its presence and services in these key states.

data.title: DECKED unveils a new durable, customizable, theft-proof truck bed tool box, joining its Drawer System and CargoGlide as ultimate truck storage systems.
data.description: Based in Ketchum, Idaho, DECKED, a top provider of truck bed organization solutions, has unveiled its latest product - the Tool Box. This new addition complements DECKED's existing Drawer System and CargoGlide, becoming the ultimate trio of truck storage systems in the market. The Tool Box has been completely reimagined from the ground up to offer enhanced durability, functionality, and protection against theft and weather conditions, surpassing other tool boxes available for truck beds. As DECKED's latest innovation, the Tool Box is set to revolutionize the industry. Customers can soon purchase this cutting-edge product to optimize their truck bed storage solutions.

data.title: AlphaTheta introduces first apparel collection titled "ONE THROUGH MUSIC," inspired by universal language. Launches 2-part line.
data.description: AlphaTheta has introduced its inaugural apparel collection, consisting of two parts, which draws inspiration from the brand's motto of "One Through Music." The collection features a range of seasonal clothing and everyday essentials. Set in Tokyo, the announcement was made on January 13, 2026. The press kit for the collection can be accessed via the provided link.

data.title: Global central bankers unite to back Jerome Powell's Fed independence amidst U.S. investigation. Key supporters include European Central Bank President, 12 other heads; urge for monetary policy separation from politics.
data.description: Top central bankers from various countries across Europe and Asia have expressed strong support for Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell amidst increased scrutiny from the U.S. Justice Department over his congressional testimony. A coalition of influential central bankers released a joint statement on Tuesday in solidarity with Powell, emphasizing the importance of maintaining monetary independence to uphold global financial stability. European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde, speaking on behalf of twelve central banks, including the Bank of England's Governor Andrew Bailey and the Reserve Bank of Australia's Governor Michele Bullock, voiced their support for Powell. The statement also highlighted concerns about political interference in monetary policy and its potential impact on both U.S. credibility and the stability of the global financial system.

data.title: Rich Bursek of Certuity announces expansion with three strategic Managing Director appointments in Q4 2025.
data.description: In January 13, 2026, in North Palm Beach, Florida, Rich Bursek, the President and Partner of Certuity, disclosed the expansion of the multi-family office's leadership team and national presence in the last quarter of 2025. Three key Managing Director positions were filled strategically, contributing to the growth and breadth of the organization.

data.title: Americans Cutting Back on Retirement Savings, Allianz Life Study Finds
data.description: Minneapolis-based research reveals that amid the current economic climate, Americans are reducing their retirement contributions. The latest Q4 2025 Quarterly Market Perceptions Study from Allianz Life indicates a decline in optimism about financial prospects compared to the previous year. Findings show that 66% of individuals have scaled back their savings in the last six months. With fewer Americans hopeful for an improved financial outlook, it is evident that many are facing challenges in sustaining their retirement funds.

data.title: Silver Cross introduces new Unfolding Family of Strollers Nia and Breez, promising a revolution in convenience and design.
data.description: A significant development in family mobility is set to take place in North Yorkshire, England, as renowned British nursery brand Silver Cross, known for inventing the first pram back in 1877, is gearing up to transform the stroller market once more. The company has introduced its groundbreaking Unfolding Family of Strollers, featuring the innovative models Nia and Breez.

data.title: Six experts from The Brattle Group named Principal. Includes Josh Figueroa, Dr. Nathalie Hinchey, Farooq Javed, Dr. Zening Li, Tania Tholot, and Julia Zhu.
data.description: In Boston on January 13, 2026, The Brattle Group revealed the promotion of six employees to the prestigious position of Principal. The individuals who achieved this milestone are Josh Figueroa, Dr. Nathalie Hinchey, Farooq Javed, Dr. Zening Li, Tania Tholot, and Julia Zhu. This announcement underscores the company's commitment to recognizing and elevating talent within its ranks.

data.title: J.F. Lehman & Company acquires Wellman Dynamics, specializing in aerospace, defense, maritime sectors.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, a prominent alternative asset manager, J.F. Lehman & Company ("JFLCO"), specializing in aerospace, defense, government, maritime, environmental, and infrastructure sectors, revealed that an investment affiliate of JFL Equity has made a significant move.
